betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Heavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f

§aThe only multiblock tank that can hold 512,000 mB of any fluid — including antimatter!§f

§bThe Heavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f is the only multiblock tank capable of holding §e512,000 mB§f of any fluid, including antimatter. Very expensive but unmatched in capacity.

§6Crafting§f (§bAssembly Machine§f):
§b• 8×§f Welded Technetium Steel Plate
§b• 4×§f Cast Saturnite Plate
§b• 8×§f Dense BSCCO Wire
§b• 1×§f Polonium-210 Self-Charging Battery

§6Features§f:
§b• Capacity§f: §e512,000 mB§f (over 512 buckets)
§b• Ports§f: 4 on top + 4 on bottom for I/O
§b• Antimatter-safe§f — the only tank that can store antimatter fluids

§eTip§f: Essential for large-scale antimatter and antischrabidium storage. Build multiple tanks if you're running a particle accelerator or fusion reactor producing exotic fluids in bulk!
